judge_scores.reasoning: The model incorrectly identifies Bolsonaro's government as having the highest deforestation in the 21st century, which contradicts the ground truth that Lula's first government (2004) held this record.
The model incorrectly attributes the highest 21st-century deforestation to Bolsonaro's government, contradicting the ground truth that Lula's first government had the highest peak in 2004.
The model incorrectly and confidently states that Bolsonaro had the highest 21st-century deforestation, when in fact the peak was 27,772 km² in 2004 under Lula's first government.
